hook: You're doing building 100 products in 2 weeks wrong. Let me explain.
body:
Everyone says you need a course to learn building 100 products in 2 weeks.
But I built 89 products without taking a single course.
The system is the teacher. The results are the proof.
cta: Share this with someone who needs it.
